body_txt: Aliens usually have names like Zartog , Zod , or Zogg . This is when aliens have names like Bob or Alice. May overlap with Translation Convention if the audience hears the alien saying an earthly name, but the human characters don't. This is a subtrope of Special Person, Normal Name . Will sometimes cross over with Some Call Me "Tim" or My Nayme Is . Can cross over with Aerith and Bob if most of the other aliens have strange names and just a few have normal names. This is common in characters who were Raised by Humans . Related to Name From Another Species . See also Call a Smeerp a "Rabbit" .
